Content_Sketch: Cafe in Dubai - you sit reading newspaper. Across from you: a man who will not survive the week. He does not know. You do.
Illustration_Note: Two stickmen at cafe table. SUBJECT in grey suit with newspaper. FACELESS asset in grey jacket with tea cup. Dubai skyline through window.

Content_Sketch: You have never been to Iran. But someone there trusts you with their life. He orders tea. Checks his watch. Slides his phone face-down.
Illustration_Note: Close framing of cafe table. Tea cup. Phone face-down. FACELESS asset's grey jacket. SUBJECT watching from behind newspaper.

Content_Sketch: Weight statement: You are a ghost. You don't pull the trigger. But you choose who goes back.
Illustration_Note: Dark background. Bold text. Stickman silhouette with encrypted phone.

Content_Sketch: Training at the Farm. Learning to become someone no one remembers. The art of forgettable.
Illustration_Note: Stickman in training facility. Obstacle course. FACELESS instructors. Plain building exterior.

Content_Sketch: First station in the Gulf. Office looks like a consulting firm. SCIF behind reception desk. MICE framework - finding the crack in loyalty.
Illustration_Note: Commercial tower interior. SUBJECT at desk with monitor. SCIF door behind. Lanyard badge. Gulf city visible through window.

Content_Sketch: First developmental contact: telecom engineer. Always orders tea. Checks watch every 2 minutes. Grey jacket. You spend 6 months before the first ask.
Illustration_Note: Cafe meeting. SUBJECT across from FACELESS asset in grey jacket. Tea cup. Asset checking watch. Counter-surveillance implied by window reflection.

Content_Sketch: The ritual: 6 hours counter-surveillance for 15-minute conversation. Three taxis. Walk through souk. Sit in cafe. Same man passes twice - different shirt same shoes.
Illustration_Note: Split composition: stickman walking through souk, sitting in cafe, watching. FACELESS man passing twice. Paranoia visual.

Content_Sketch: Micro-hook: Nothing happens. That is how you know something is wrong. You check the route again. Same shoes. Or did you imagine it?
Illustration_Note: SUBJECT standing alone in alley reviewing route mentally. Suspicious shadows. Night lighting.

Content_Sketch: Weight line: You don't kill anyone. You just convince them to go back.
Illustration_Note: Dark background. Bold text. Stickman silhouette watching someone walk away toward taxi.

Content_Sketch: Iran 2026 escalation. Langley demands more sources. Vetting shortened from 6 months to 3 weeks. Speed over safety.
Illustration_Note: Langley SCIF. Multiple screens showing maps. FACELESS officials around table. Urgent posture. SUBJECT receiving phone call.

Content_Sketch: CI seed: internal email asks about a meeting you did not report. You don't remember who you told. Self-doubt begins.
Illustration_Note: SUBJECT at station desk reading email on screen. Concerned expression. Encrypted phone beside laptop.

Content_Sketch: Irreversible marker #1: You recruit wartime asset with insufficient vetting. File the cable anyway. Production over tradecraft.
Illustration_Note: SUBJECT typing cable at secure terminal. FACELESS new asset photo on desk. Clock showing late hour. 3-week timeline document.

Content_Sketch: Asset tells you about his daughter. You tell him about yours - except yours is a legend. His daughter is real. In your cable he is a cryptonym. He is production.
Illustration_Note: Two stickmen at safe house. FACELESS asset showing phone photo. SUBJECT listening. Recording equipment behind bookshelf.

Content_Sketch: CI threat escalates: counterintelligence officer sits in your briefing. Takes notes you cannot see. Someone at Langley knows a detail they should not know.
Illustration_Note: Briefing room. SUBJECT presenting. FACELESS CI officer in corner with notepad. Tension visible in SUBJECT posture.

Content_Sketch: Weight line: You are not just watching others. You are being watched.
Illustration_Note: Dark background. Bold text. Split stickman silhouette - one watching, one being watched.

Content_Sketch: Signature #1 - The Last Message: Asset sends 'They know.' Silence. No follow-up. No check-in next day. Channel open. You check every morning. Grey jacket. Tea. Watch. Gone.
Illustration_Note: SUBJECT at station desk staring at screen showing encrypted message. Two words. Empty response field. Morning light through blinds.

Content_Sketch: Signature #2 - The Wrong Target: Your intel leads to strike. BDA on desk. You zoom in. Not a facility. People. Your information was accurate. The coordinates were yours. You cannot un-provide them.
Illustration_Note: SUBJECT at desk with printed BDA report. Satellite imagery. Hand over image. Langley SCIF background.

Content_Sketch: Signature #3 - Exfil Denied: Asset compromised. You promised to extract. Langley committee says 'Not at this time.' He has a daughter. Same age as yours. You cannot warn him. You cannot resign.
Illustration_Note: SUBJECT on secure phone. Langley conference room split with SUBJECT at station desk. Denial posture. Photo of asset's family on desk.

Content_Sketch: Signature #4 - The Asset Turns: New asset surfaces. Still orders tea. Still checks watch. But information too clean. Too convenient. You file cable because career depends on production.
Illustration_Note: Cafe meeting with FACELESS new asset. Tea on table. Watch visible. SUBJECT studying with suspicion. Same grey jacket. Uncanny echo.

Content_Sketch: Network collapse: 11 names compromised. You recognize 3. One always ordered tea. Weight: the calculus was wrong. You were the calculus.
Illustration_Note: SUBJECT alone in SCIF reading names on screen. 11 entries. 3 highlighted. Empty chair beside. Night. Harsh fluorescent.

Content_Sketch: Suburban Virginia. Split-level house. Daughter's drawing on fridge. Encrypted phone in jacket on coat rack. Checking it under the dinner table.
Illustration_Note: Suburban home interior. SUBJECT at dinner table with FACELESS wife and small FACELESS daughter. Phone visible under table edge. Drawing on fridge. Warm home lighting.

Content_Sketch: Daughter asks: 'Do you help people?' You say yes. Most honest lie you ever told. You are not sure the answer is still true.
Illustration_Note: Kitchen scene. Small FACELESS daughter looking up at SUBJECT. SUBJECT kneeling. Warm light. Daughter's drawing visible.

Content_Sketch: You know the truth. Reports get edited. Ceasefire on TV. Someone claps. You think about the grey jacket.
Illustration_Note: Living room. TV showing news coverage. SUBJECT on couch staring. FACELESS wife beside watching TV. SUBJECT not watching - looking at phone in jacket across room.

Content_Sketch: Weight line: You help. You also betray. At the same time. The same person.
Illustration_Note: Dark background. Bold text. Stickman silhouette holding phone and daughter's drawing.

Content_Sketch: Same cafe. Same table. Same newspaper. Empty chair across. No tea on the table. The absence is the loudest thing in the room.
Illustration_Note: Cafe callback mirror of HOOK. SUBJECT alone at same table. Grey suit. Newspaper. Empty chair opposite. No tea cup. Dubai light through window.

Content_Sketch: Phone vibrates. Unknown signal. After months of silence. You stare at it. You do not open it. Final: This is how a war ends. No one tells you.
Illustration_Note: Dark background. Encrypted phone screen glowing. Bold text beneath. Stickman silhouette at cafe table alone.
